SessionStart.description: Inject devflow-discovery meta-skill and suggest context file based on active pipeline step from .devflow-state.json.

PreToolUse.description: Block modifications to linter/analyzer config files (analysis_options.yaml, eslint.config.*, tsconfig*.json, biome.json, .prettierrc). Steers agent to fix code instead of weakening configs.
Log pre-tool-call events to .devflow-observe.jsonl for continuous learning and pattern analysis.

PostToolUse.description: Log post-tool-call events to .devflow-observe.jsonl for continuous learning and pattern analysis.

PreCompact.description: Snapshot pipeline progress (plan.md [done]/[pending]) before context compaction. Saves .devflow-state.json and injects a resume reminder into the compacted context.

Stop.description: Send macOS desktop notification when Claude finishes a response. Shows next pipeline step and feature name from .devflow-state.json if available.
Scan modified files for debug output (print() in Dart, console.log in TypeScript) and warn via stderr without blocking.
